rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.315, which governs a memorandum of understanding between TEA and the Texas School for the Deaf.
quote: The Texas Education Agency and the Texas School for the Deaf shall develop a memorandum of understanding to establish:
_note: No overlap between proposed change (property tax homestead exemption) and rule text (school for the deaf MOU).
